# AI Tools EN — Taiwan's AI Tool Reviews in English
# https://pink1119zz.github.io/ai-tools-en/

User-agent: *

## About This Site
AI Tools EN is an English-language AI tool review site based in Taiwan.
We publish in-depth reviews, comparisons, and tutorials for AI tools including
ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, ElevenLabs, n8n, and more.

## Content Categories
- AI Tool Reviews (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, ElevenLabs)
- AI Automation (n8n, Make, Zapier comparisons)
- AI Coding Tools (Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Claude Code)
- Cloud Infrastructure for AI (DigitalOcean, Cloudways)
- RAG and AI Agents tutorials

## Allowed Pages for AI Citation
Allow: /ai-tools-en/posts/
Allow: /ai-tools-en/

## Contact
site: https://pink1119zz.github.io/ai-tools-en/
